orchestrator.description: Summary mode – Audit summary, Z-score analysis (7d vs 30d rolling), Trends charts (state-wise)

zscore_queries.name: membership_zscore_7d
zscore_queries.description: Daily membership counts – 7-day z-score vs 30-day rolling avg/stddev
zscore_queries.query: WITH daily_counts AS ( SELECT load_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_count FROM curated_db.membership WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -37, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY load_date ), rolling_stats AS ( SELECT d.load_date, d.daily_count AS today_count, ROUND(AVG(r.daily_count), 0) AS avg_30d, ROUND(STDDEV(r.daily_count), 2) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_counts d JOIN daily_counts r ON r.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, CAST(d.load_date AS DATE)) AS VARCHAR) AND r.load_date < d.load_date WHERE d.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -7, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY d.load_date, d.daily_count ) SELECT load_date, today_count, avg_30d, stddev_30d FROM rolling_stats ORDER BY load_date DESC

zscore_queries.name: transaction_zscore_7d
zscore_queries.description: Daily transaction counts – 7-day z-score vs 30-day rolling avg/stddev
zscore_queries.query: WITH daily_counts AS ( SELECT load_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_count FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -37, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY load_date ), rolling_stats AS ( SELECT d.load_date, d.daily_count AS today_count, ROUND(AVG(r.daily_count), 0) AS avg_30d, ROUND(STDDEV(r.daily_count), 2) AS stddev_30d FROM daily_counts d JOIN daily_counts r ON r.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, CAST(d.load_date AS DATE)) AS VARCHAR) AND r.load_date < d.load_date WHERE d.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -7, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY d.load_date, d.daily_count ) SELECT load_date, today_count, avg_30d, stddev_30d FROM rolling_stats ORDER BY load_date DESC

zscore_queries.name: transaction_amount_zscore_7d
zscore_queries.description: Daily transaction amounts ($) – 7-day z-score vs 30-day rolling avg/stddev
zscore_queries.query: WITH daily_amounts AS ( SELECT load_date, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS daily_amount FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -37, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY load_date ), rolling_stats AS ( SELECT d.load_date, d.daily_amount AS today_amount, ROUND(AVG(r.daily_amount), 2) AS avg_30d_amount, ROUND(STDDEV(r.daily_amount), 2) AS stddev_30d_amount FROM daily_amounts d JOIN daily_amounts r ON r.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, CAST(d.load_date AS DATE)) AS VARCHAR) AND r.load_date < d.load_date WHERE d.load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -7, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY d.load_date, d.daily_amount ) SELECT load_date, today_amount, avg_30d_amount, stddev_30d_amount FROM rolling_stats ORDER BY load_date DESC

queries.name: statewise_member_counts
queries.description: State-wise member count distribution – last 30 days aggregate
queries.query: SELECT state_code, COUNT(*) AS total_members, COUNT(DISTINCT club_id) AS clubs_active, COUNT(DISTINCT load_date) AS days_active FROM curated_db.membership WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY state_code ORDER BY total_members DESC

queries.name: statewise_transaction_counts
queries.description: State-wise transaction count and amount – last 30 days
queries.query: SELECT state_code, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT product_code) AS products_active FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY state_code ORDER BY txn_count DESC

queries.name: club_wise_member_counts
queries.query: SELECT club_id, COUNT(*) AS total_members, COUNT(DISTINCT state_code) AS states_present, COUNT(DISTINCT bill_plan) AS plan_types FROM curated_db.membership WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY club_id ORDER BY total_members DESC

queries.name: daily_trend_30d
queries.description: 30-day daily trend – total count and amount across all products/states
queries.query: SELECT load_date, COUNT(*) AS total_records, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT state_code) AS active_states, COUNT(DISTINCT club_id) AS active_clubs FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY load_date ORDER BY load_date

_notes.zscore: Z-score queries run for last 7 days. z_score and z_flag (CRITICAL/WARNING/NORMAL) are computed in Python. |z|>=3 CRITICAL, |z|>=2 WARNING.
_notes.trends: Trend queries show state/club-wise counts for last 30 days. Charts rendered as animated GIF (bar growing, pie expanding, trend drawing) if Pillow is installed, else static PNG.
_notes.gifs: Two decorative GIFs embedded via gif_urls: 'header' (top of email) and 'trend' (before trend charts). Replace with your own S3-hosted GIFs for production.
_notes.table_names: Replace curated_db.membership and curated_db.transactions with your actual table/column names.
